title: Infinity Golem Boss Fight
description: This mod adds NEW BOSS INFINITY GOLEM. You can't find it in survival.
body:
This mod adds NEW BOSS INFINITY GOLEM. You can't find it in survival.

It has such attacks as:
1. Hitting the ground with its hands
2. Summoning falling fireballs
3. Jump with the summoning of fireballs
4. Super ROAR!

 This mod is not finished, it's in beta testing.

 I will make his story in my original mod
